name: destructive swing
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Close Weapon Attack with -2 to the Attack Sum (this does not effect Bonuses and Downsides). This Attack gains +1 damage

name: headbutt
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Close Attack. On Hit: Give the target 2 Stun, or if you are Grappling the target give them 4 Stun instead. Bonus: +1 Stun. Downside: -1 Stun

name: charge
effect: Spend ## and 1 Strain then move your Speed. If you moved at least 3 tiles, do a Close Attack against a target you move next to.

name: cleave
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain, then do a Close Weapon Attack against all targets Close to you.

name: meteor leap
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain then jump 3xSpeed. If you land on or next to a target you may do a Close Attack against them

name: guardian's riposte
effect: When a Creature Close to you Attacks you may spend a Locked ⚂ to do a Close Weapon Attack against them. Use 3+⚂ for the Attack sum.

name: defender
effect: Spend a Locked ⚂ to do one of the following: Give a creature Close to you Obscured until the end of the turn. When a creature Close to you is Hit you may take the Hit instead. When you get Hit reduce damage by ⚂.

name: fortify
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain then until the beginning of your next turn you are Rooted, immune to Knockback, and take -1 Physical damage from all sources. (This Art does not stack.)

name: reach for it
effect: Spend 1 Strain to increase the range of an action by 1 tier. Close -> Reaching -> Near -> Far -> Distant

name: bull rush
effect: Spend ⚂ then Move. During this Move you may go through weak walls. You Knockback creatures you move into equal to your Physique, and destroy segments of t

name: maneuver
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Close Weapon Attack. You may choose to move 2 tiles before or after this Attack

name: marking strike
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain, then do a Weapon Attack. If you hit, give the target Marked until the start of your next turn.

name: piercing shot
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 2 Strain, then do a Weapon Attack. It damages all targets in a line up to your Weapons Range. This may go through weak walls

name: ricochet
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 2 Strain, then do a Ranged Weapon Attack. On Hit, pick a new target within 3 tiles of this one and repeat this Art without spending Strain or dice. Use the same Attack Sum. (You cannot bounce to an already chosen target.)

name: train of thought
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then gain a dice that has a value of the combined dice (to a maximum of a 6).

name: give orders
effect: You may give ⚂⚂ to another creature. They may do any action(s) with these dice immediately. (These dice are lost if not used.)

name: find object
effect: Spend a few minutes naming or describing an object. The object can be a general item, such as a sword or crate, or it can be more specific such as a letter with a gold bird on its front. You can be as specific as you would like, such as 'My golden short sword'. You then know the approximate distance and direction of the nearest object you described. This has a max range of 1 large tile (2,160x2,160 tiles), failing if no item is within this range. This effect lasts for a few hour or until you see/touch the object

name: plan ahead
effect: Spend ⚂ to roll 2d6 and Lock one of them

name: shooting star
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Spirit Attack against a Nearby target. On Hit: Make the target illuminate the surrounding area and until the beginning of your next turn they take 1 damage for every tile they are forcefully moved. Bonus: Knockback the target 2 + your Ingenuity or Spirit.

name: searing smite
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain to do a Close Weapon Attack. The Attack gains: On Hit, the target is Marked until the beginning of your next turn and gains 3 Burn

name: spear of light or dark
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain to do an Attack against a Far target. On Hit: Deal 2+Spirit Soul damage, and give the target Marked or Blinded until the start of your next turn. Bonus: You gain Rallied or Empowered. Downside: Do 2 less damage and do not apply Marked or Blinded.

name: bless
effect: Spend ⚂, 0 Strain, and pick a Close target. The target gets +1 Forward, then roll Spirit. On a Failure increase this Art's Strain cost by 1 until your next Rest.

name: spirit shield
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain to give a Nearby Creature -1 damage from Physical, Elemental, or Soul sources until the beginning of your next turn. (This effect does not stack.)

name: holy veil
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain. Pick a Nearby creature, they are covered in a blurry veil for up to 1 hour or until they are Hit. During this time they gain +1 Dodge and Ongoing to Hide

name: bound souls
effect: Spend a few minutes and 0 Strain or 6 Strain for a moment (free action) to bind two willing creatures souls together. Until your next Rest, you bind the souls of both creatures together, making it so whenever one is effected by an art, damage, or effect the other may gain any benifits or take all damage. For every time you activate this, increase the Strain cost by 6. This cost goes back to 0 at the end of a Rest.

name: covenant whispers
effect: Spend 1 minute and 0 Strain to ask a powerful entity (a god, demon, dragon, eldritch being, etc) a question about the future. They will tell the truth but only with one word. For every time you activate this, increase the Strain cost by 2. This cost goes back to 0 at the end of a Rest.

name: miracle
effect: Once in a while, you may spend ⚂⚂⚂⚂ and 8 Strain to call forth a Miracle. Your GM determines what happens and it must only be beneficial to you and your group. This may auto pass a Check, activate an Art, make something almost impossible happen, ect

name: hollow shards
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do an Attack against a Nearby target. On Hit: Deal 2 physical damage and the next time you activate this Art it does 2 extra damage this turn. (Stacking.) Bonus: +1 to the Attack Sum.

name: force away
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ then every creature you can Reach must roll Finesse. On a Partial they take 2 physical damage. On a Failure do the Partial and they get Knocked back 4 tiles.

name: splinters
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain then do an Attack against up to 3 Nearby targets. You may pick the same target multiple times, making them do multiple Dodge rolls. On Hit: Deal 1 physical damage. Bonus: Pick 1 extra target. Downside: Pick 1 less target.

name: weightless
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain to make a target weightless for a few minutes. If the target is unwilling do an Ingenuity Contest, making them weightless if you win. While weightless the target is no longer tied down by gravity and can 'swim' through the air. All terrain is counted as Rough Terrain while 'swimming'.

name: magic trick
effect:
Spend ⚂ then pick *Move, Memory Perl, or Small Hole*; these effects last for a few minutes.
- *Move* - Touch a small item. Once per turn, you may spend ⚂ to make that item move a few tiles in a straight line.
- *Memory Perl* - Create a small Perl with 1 memory or thought that is no longer than 1 minute long. When a creature touches the Perl they then telepathically hear and/or see this memory/thought.
- *Small Hole* - Create a portal, no larger than your fist, in front of you with an exit Close by. You do not need to see the exit point to make this portal. (It can be on the other side of a wall.)

name: telepathy
effect: Spend ⚂ and 0 Strain then choose a willing Nearby Creature. You bind your mind to them then either of you may choose to see/hear through the other's senses instead of their own. They may also send/receive simple messages. Increase the Strain cost by 2 for each creature bound this way.

name: spectral parachute
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain then pick up to 2*Inginuity Nearby targets. For the next couple of minutes, they are able to glide 2 tiles for every 1 tile they fall and cannot take fall damage.

name: big or small
effect:
Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain then Touch a target to make them Bigger or Smaller. For the next few hours the target's size changes 
- Bigger: The target doubles in size and weight, their Close Attacks become Reaching, -1 Dodge, gains Advantage on Physique rolls, and Disadvantage on Dextarity rolls.
- Smaller: The target halves in size and weight, gets +1 Dodge, -1d4 Physical damage (min 1), Advantage on Dextarity rolls, and Disadvantage on Physique rolls.

name: soul skip
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain to teleport to a Nearby location you can see.

name: dispel magic
effect: Spend a few minutes or ⚂⚂⚂ for a moment then pick a Nearby Target being affected by an magic. Roll Inginuity or Spirit, on a Success you disipate the effects of the magic. If the magic is perminant then it is disabled for your Inginuity or Spirit minutes instead. On a Partial, do the Success but also spend Strain equal to the magics Strain cost, to a max of 5.

name: stepping stones
effect: Spend ⚂ and 3 Strain to teleport to a location that you can see up to a total of 18 tiles away. You can break up this teleportation into any number of 'steps' where you can do other actions. If you do not use up all of the teleportation by the end of your turn you lose the remaining steps.

name: flight
effect: Spend ⚂ and 3 Strain to make a creature you touch flight for up to an hour. Increase the Strain cost by 6 for each creature given flight this way.

name: farsight
effect: Spend a few minutes and 4 Strain to start observing a location far away from you for a few hours. Pick a location you have been or know of. The better you know an area the closer you see it. For instance if you pick your home then you are able to be inside it and move around it. Or alternatively if you pick somewhere you have never been, such as a strange city, you are only able to observe it from far above it. You can see and hear through the location as if you were there but lose your own senses.

name: footwork lure
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Close Weapon Attack. On Hit, make the target move somewhere within Reaching of you

name: taunt
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and do a Presence Contest against a creature Nearby. If you win, the target must interact with you and has -3 Forward to their next roll not pertaining to you. (This may make you the sole target of a creatures Attacks). If you lose, spend 1 Strain

name: heckle
effect: When a Creature Attacks or does an Attack or rolls to Size Up or Manipulate Someone. Spend 2 Strain and a Locked ⚂ to give them bonus Soul Damage equal to your Presence, or Advantage on their check/contest. (This Art has no effect if either the creature or their target can't hear you.)

name: motivate
effect: Once per turn, spend ⚂ and 1 Strain to give a creature nearby the ⚂. If this is used outside of combat give them +1 Forward. (To a max of +3 Forward)

name: maddening call
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain. Pick a Nearby Creature, they must roll Presence. On a Failure (6-) they gain 3 Stun and -2 Forward. On a Partial, they gain 2 Stun and -1 Forward. (Minimum Forward is -3

name: lightshow
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ and 2 Strain then pick then pick a point Nearby. Everything within Reach of that point becomes Blinded until the start of your next turn and must roll Presence. On a Partial they gain 1 Stun. On a Failure they gain 3 Stun.

name: point out
effect: Spend ⚂ to give a target you can see Marked until the start of your next turn. You gain +1 Forward on Size Up or Manipulate Someone against them.

name: disguise
effect: Over a few minutes, or if you spend ⚂⚂⚂ and 1 Strain a moment, give a creature Close to you a Disguise. The Disguise can change physical appearance, clothes, and/or the way they smell. While someone has this Disguise they get +1 Ongoing to act as the Disguise or to hide who they are. The Disguise lasts for a few hours or until they take damage.

name: minor illusion
effect: Spend ⚂ to make a simple Hologram thats no bigger than a person somewhere Nearby. The Hologram can be animated and lasts for a few minutes. A creature may do a Look Around or Investigate contest against you to discern if it's a Hologram.

name: dramaturgy
effect:
Spend ⚂ then pick *Grow or Wither, Set the Stage, Strange Steps, or BE LOUD*; these effects last for a few minutes.
- *Grow or Wither* - Touch a small plant or seed. You make that plant grow or die and decay.
- *Set the Stage* - You create a weak illusion that can cover everything within 3 tiles of you. This illusion can do things such as make the room noticeably darker, add colored lighting, simple effects such as sparks or thin smoke, or other similar effects.
- *Strange Steps* - Your footprints change, instead of leaving normal footprints you may instead grow small plants or flowers, leave behind illusionary fire, glowing foot prints, or a similar effect.
- *BE LOUD* - Sounds you make become 3 times as loud.

name: intrusive thoughts
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 2 Strain to read the surface thoughts of a Creature Far away for a couple of minutes. You may later spend ⚂ to do an Awareness contest against them. If you win, you may read the Creature's innermost thoughts or may implant a single thought into the target's mind. They believe the thought was their own. (The target does not need to act on the thought if it goes against their nature.) If you lose, the creature knows an Art was activated on them but not who did it. (This has no effect on creatures that don't have a mind, such as an Undead or Construct.

name: arc thrower
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do a Elemental Attack against a Nearby Target. If you target a Gadget or Mechanism you may activate or deactivate it for 1 minute (6 turns). On Hit: Do 1 damage and 1 Burn. Bonus: Pick a new target within Reaching range and repeat this Attack.

name: shrapnel shot
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain, then pick a point within your Weapon's Range. Do Ranged Weapon Attack against everything within Reach of the tiles of that point.

name: chain lightning
effect:
Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain then do an Attack against a Far target. On Hit: Do 2+Inginuity Elemental damage. Then pick a new target within Reach of this one and do this Attack against them. Bonus: Bounce to a new target even if you miss. Downside: -2 damage.
(Use the same Attack Sum for all Attacks, and you cannot bounce to an already chosen target.)

name: field repair
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain then pick a target within Reach. Give that target ⚂ Temporary Shields and remove all Burn on them.

name: wondrous smells
effect: Spend ⚂ and 3 Strain; Give all creatures of your choice Nearby a Locked 1d6 (you roll), Empowered for 1 hour, or Heal 1d4 HP.

name: augment
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain to do one of the following based on the ⚂'s value. These effects last a few minutes. 1,2: Give a creature +1 Speed. 3,4: Give a target 1 Shielding. 5,6: Give a Weapon +1 Burn on Hit.

name: oil patch
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ then pick a surface Nearby. Cover every surface within 3 tiles of this point in Oil. If a creature moves across this patch they fall Prone unless the dice spent was a 5 or 6 (roll a d6 if not in combat). Targets covered in oil gain 3 extra Burn when they first gain Burn stacks. (Fire will spread through the oil)

name: alarm
effect: Over a few minutes put a special Alarm on a location, container, or item Close to you. The Alarm goes off when something happens (such as being touched or moved) and can set off items, make a loud noise, or inform you specifically of being triggered.

name: heavy duty lock
effect: Over a few moments put a special Lock on an entryway, container, or similar target Close to you. The Lock can be locked or unlocked by presenting some form of password or object (such as a special symbol) which is declared when made.

name: deployable wall
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain then make a wall you can Reach that is up to 3 tiles long and 1 tile high and has 2+⚂ health. (Objects always get Hit, Fail Checks, and lose Contests)

name: heat metal
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain to make a metal object Close to you glow white hot for a few minutes. You get +1 to Tinker on the object, and anything (other than you) that touches it gains 2 Burn once a turn.

name: tent
effect: Spend a couple of minutes to create a special tent that lasts hours. The tent can be up to 2 tiles square on the outside and 6 tiles square on the inside. When created you may have the tent contain: up to 3 beds, an empty chest 1 tile large, a table of any size, any number of chairs, a light which illuminates the entire tent, and a rug. Items made this way cannot leave the tent. Creatures and items inside the tent are placed in the nearest open tile when the tent disappears.

name: vine whip
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then do an Attack against a Nearby Target. On Hit: Do Spirit Physical damage and you may pull the target 3 tiles towards you. Or, if you target a surface, pull yourself Close to it. Bonus: Double the distance pulled

name: rip and tear
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain to do a Close Weapon Attack. On Hit, remove 8 Shielding then do the other Weapon effects.

name: thorny roots
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ and pick up to 3xSpirit connected tiles on a surface. This region becomes Rough Terrain and you may spend 1 Strain to do 3 Soul damage to any creature who moves inside it.

name: tailing mark
effect: Spend ⚂ to give a target you can see Marked until the start of your next turn. If you give a 6, give them Marked for a few hours instead. While the target is Marked this way you know the rough direction of the target regardless of distance.

name: bola throw
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then pick a Nearby Creature, they must roll Finesse. On a Failure (6-) they gain Slow or if they already have Slow, become Prone. On a Partial, they gain Slow

name: winds grace
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain to give a creature you Touch +2 Speed for an hour. Increase the Strain cost by 1 for each creature buffed this way.

name: uncanny climb
effect: Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain; Focus on making a creature you touch able to walk on walls and ceilings for up to 1 hour

name: control elements
effect:
Spend ⚂ to change the general shape, color, and temperature of loose earth (such as dirt, gravel, or sand), non-special gasses (such as fog, smoke, or air), fires, and simple liquids (such as water or oil) up to a maximum of 1 cubic tile. 
- *Some examples are; being able to freeze water, ignite or snuff out small fires, dry wet objects or creatures, make air bubbles in water (extends breathable air to a few minutes), and remove grime from surfaces.

name: track creature
effect: Spend ⚂ to follow the path of a creature which you have named or have evidence of. If the creature is within 1 days worth of travel of you, a path will appear in front of you guiding you along

name: wall of thorns
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain then make a wall you can Reach that is up to 3 tiles long and 1 tile high. It has 3 health and when a creature touches the wall you may deal 2 phisical damage to them at the beginning of their turn. If a creature is knocked back into the Wall they take 4 extra damage. Creatures may climb the wall without doing a roll. (Objects always get Hit, Fail Checks, and lose Contests).

name: blood thinning dart
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ then pick a Nearby target, they must do a Physique roll. On a Partial they cant Heal until the start of your next turn. On a Failure do the Partial effect and they also take Spirit Soul damage.

name: hollow heart poison
effect: Spend ⚂ and pick a Close Creature. For the next few hours their heart stops, skin turns pale, and they are perceived to be dead while not moving by all forms of magic and investigation. The target cant be detected via magic and Undead will ignore them.

name: sleeping powder
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain to pick up to your Awareness number of Nearby Creatures. These Creatures must do a Presence roll. On a Partial they become drowsy and have -1 Ongoing to Awareness and Speed. On a Failure they fall asleep. These effects last until they take damage or are woken up by spending ##. (Constructs, Undead, and already asleep Creatures are unaffected by this Art.)

name: healing drop
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain to heal a creature Nearby as if you used a Bandage (1d4). (This has no effect on Undead or Constructs.)

name: if these walls could talk
effect: Spend a few minutes to ask the spirits what happened up to a day prior. The spirits will answer the best they can but will never give more than a rough description. The spirits also cannot describe something that happened through magic or if it was hidden with magic, such as a creature moving under the Invisibility spell.

name: last words
effect: Spend a few minutes and 3 Strain at a dead creature. The soul of the creature will then awaken to answer up to 3 questions. The soul has all of its memories from when it was alive and maintains its personality. (There is a high chance that if you killed the creature it would not talk to you.) This spell cannot make the creature intelligent or teach them your language (such as with an animal or construct). This spell will end once 3 questions are asked of it or after an hour.

name: precision strike
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 1 Strain, then do a Weapon Attack with +3 to the Attack Sum (this does not effect Bonuses and Downsides)

name: hook shot
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ to pull a small object Far from you Close to you. If you target something larger do a Physique roll. On a Partial, pull the target 3+Physique tiles towards you. On a Success pull twice as far.

name: dark mists
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ then pick then pick a point Nearby. Everything within Reach of that point becomes Obscured for a few minutes.

name: shadow self
effect:
Spend ⚂ and 1 Strain; Turn your Shadow into a tangible creature. When cast or by spending ⚂ you may move your Shadow up to your SPEED. Your Shadow can manipulate items, and you may activate Arts or do Attacks through your shadow. Your Shadow has 1 Health and 0 Dodge. 
- While your shadow is a creature you do not have a shadow and if it was to die your shadow would be returned to you. You may have your shadow act independently of you, however it cannot activate Arts or do Attacks on its own. (It is not a Follower)

name: invisibility
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain to make a creature you Touch Invisible for up to an hour. If the creature does an Attack or activates a another Art they lose Invisibility. (You may activate this Art again on a different creature without breaking Invisibility.) Increase the Strain cost by 1 for each creature made Invisible this way.

name: shadow step
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain to teleport yourself and up to one other person Far away to a large enough shadow you are aware of.

name: molly
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ and 1 Strain then pick a point Nearby. Everything within Reach of that point gains 2 Burn.

name: grenade
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ and 1 Strain then pick then pick a point Nearby. Everything within Reach of that point must roll Finesse. On a Partial they go Prone. On a Failure do the Partial effect and they take 1 damage

name: elemental aura
effect: Spend ⚂ and 2 Strain then pick 2 Burn, Wet, Marked, or Obscured; You may willingly gain the chosen Status, while this Aura is active. Once per turn, when a target starts its turn in or enters your Aura they gain the chosen Status

name: fearsome roar
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 2 Strain; Do a CHARM or PHYSIQUE contest against all creatures of your choice that can hear you. Undead, Constructs, and creatures you choose are unaffected by this Art. If you win, the creature has -1 on all rolls against you (Attacks, Contests, etc) until the start of your next turn and must spend a dice on their next turn moving until they can no longer see you or run out of movement. If you lose, the creature cannot willingly move toward you on their next turn.

name: haste
effect: Spend ⚂ and 4 Strain; Focus on a willing creature you touch for 1 minute. When they do a roll give them 2d6 on that roll. When this Art ends the creature gains 10 Stun and is Rooted for 2 turns (20 seconds)

name: telekinesis
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 5 Strain; Focus on moving targets around for up to 1 hour. When cast or by spending ⚂⚂, you may do an ARCANA contest against a creature or item within 18 tiles of you. If you win the target is Grappled by you and you may spend ⚂ to move the target up to 6 tiles. (This is classified as Knockback, and can take Knockback damage.) Creatures may break the Grapple by spending ⚂⚂ and doing an ARCANA contest against you. If you target an object you may manipulate it as if you were holding it

name: grounding roots
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain; Spell Attack a target within 36 tiles of you. On Hit: Do 2+2xNATURE damage. If the target is flying they are forced to the ground (They take fall damage if possible). Bonus: The target gains Rooted until the beginning of your next turn

name: create airship
effect: Spend 1 hour and 10 Strain; You may turn a boat, cart, or similar entity into a makeshift airship. This airship has 1 Health,4xCRAFTING Shielding,4 Speed, and has a max height of 1 medium tile (36 normal tiles) off the ground. This lasts for 1 day after which the airship returns to normal

name: life from death
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain; Pick a point within 18 tiles of you. Do a Spell Attack against every creature within 3 tiles of that point. On Hit, do MEDICINE damage to the target and Heal a creature you can see for that amount. (Each hit activates separately.) Bonus: Do 2xMedicine damage. Downside: This does not heal

name: ritual of revival
effect: Spend 1 minute; For the next minute (6 turns), once per turn, you and any creature nearby may roll a d6+MEDICINE. On a 5 or higher the ritual gets 2 stacks. On a 3 or higher, the ritual gets 1 stack. After 1 minute you may target a dead creature within 6 tiles of you. If the total number of stacks is 18 or higher the creature is revived. The creature'sSoul must be free, and the creature cannot have been dead for more than an hour. If the creature has been revived with this ritual before, increase the stacks needed by 2x the number of times they have been revived this way

name: mist form
effect: Spend ⚂ and 4 Strain; Focus on making a creature you touch into a misty form for up to 1 hour. While they are in this form they are able to fly and may move through cracks in walls

name: mind control
effect: Spend ⚂⚂⚂ and 6 Strain; Focus on doing a Charm contest against a non-Undead/Construct creature you can see. If you win, for 1 minute the creature becomes a Follower of you. When the creature would normally take its turn, or if it takes damage from any source, redo this Charm contest (This may happen multiple times a turn.). If you lose or lost Focus, the creature gains 4 Stun

name: enrapture
effect: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Close range. On a success, they become temporarily Enraptured. While Enraptured, a target’s attention is fixed on you, narrowing their field of view and drowning out any sound but your voice. Once per rest on a success, you can mark a Stress to force the Enraptured target to mark a Stress as well

name: tell no lies
effect: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Very Close range. On a success, they can’t lie to you while they remain within Close range, but they are not compelled to speak. If you ask them a question and they refuse to answer, they must mark a Stress and the effect ends. The target is typically unaware this spell has been cast on them until it causes them to utter the truth

name: enthrall
effect: Spend ⚂⚂ and 3 Strain or remove Charmed from the target; Do a Charm contest against a target you can see within 8 tiles of you. If you win, make them do any simple action that wouldn'tknowingly harm themselves. (Use a 4 for any sums needed.

name: scryers eye
effect: Spend 1 minute; Create a floating Orb (within 1 tile of you) about the size of your eye which you may spend # to have Move up to 8 tiles. When you close at least one eye you are able to see through the Orb. The Orb has 1 Health, 0 Dodge, and lasts until you dispel it or your next Break or Rest.

name: astral projection
effect: Spend 10 minutes; You leave your physical body and turn into an astral Projection until your next Break or Rest. While in this form you are able to fly and move through non-metal walls and floors. Your Projection takes double damage and you cannot feel or sense anything from your physical body.

name: change of thinking
effect: Spend # and 2 Strain; Gain a randomly rolled dice.

name: divine detection
effect: Spend # and 1 Strain; For 1 hour, you know the approximate location of any Undead, Planar, or Mythical creatures (creatures with one or more of these types) and any place or item that has been blessed or cursed within 1 large tile (2,160x2160 tiles) of you. You know the type of creature you sense, but not its name.

name: hallowed armor
effect: Spend # and 3 Strain, then pick Monstrosity, Planar, or Undead; Touch a set of armor. For the next hour, when the wearer takes damage from a creature with the chosen type, reduce it by 2. This cannot reduce damage below 1.

name: silencing aura
effect: Spend #; Creatures in your Aura make no noise while moving and leave no trail. When a creature first moves into your Aura or starts their turn in it you may spend 2 Strain to silence them, making them unable to make sounds or activate Arts until the beginning of your next turn.

name: far skip
effect: Spend # and 4 Strain; Teleport to a location that is up to 1 medium tile (36x36 tiles) away.

name: reverberating smite
effect: Spend ## and 2 Strain; Do a Weapon Attack. If you hit, for the next 6 turns (1 minute) the target takes 2 damage for every 1 or 2 they roll. (This can stack, and is for ANY roll.)

name: rune gate
effect: Spend 5 minutes drawing, or 1 day carving, a set of runes onto a flat surface; When written you can create a gate to another Rune Gate. The gate lasts for 1 minute after which it closes. If the runes were drawn they burn away leaving an illegible scorch mark after the gate closes. If the runes were carved they stay on the surface. If there is more than one other Rune gate with the same rune code the gate opens to one of them randomly.
